name: OPKO HEALTH, INC.
business: OPKO Health is a diversified healthcare company with pharmaceutical and diagnostics segments. Its pharmaceutical business includes NGENLA (a once-weekly human growth hormone injection partnered with Pfizer) and Rayaldee (for secondary hyperparathyroidism). Its diagnostics business, BioReference, offers clinical laboratory testing services including the 4Kscore prostate cancer test.

exposures.sentence: BioReference offers comprehensive laboratory testing services utilized by healthcare providers in the detection, diagnosis, evaluation, monitoring, and treatment of diseases.
Our pharmaceutical business features NGENLA (somatrogon-ghla), also referred to as Somatrogon (hGH-CTP), a once-weekly human growth hormone injection.

Through our pharmaceutical business, we manufacture and sell Rayaldee , a U.S. Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ) approved treatment for secondary hyperparathyroidism ( SHPT ) in adults with stage 3 or 4 chronic kidney disease ( CKD ) and vitamin D insufficiency.
ModeX Therapeutics, Inc. ( ModeX ), is a biotechnology company focused on developing innovative multi-specific immune therapies for cancer and infectious disease candidates.
EirGen Pharma, Ltd. ("EirGen") specializes in the development and commercial supply of high-potency oral solid dose pharmaceutical products and exports to over 60 countries.

catalysts.event: Phase 1b studies in select solid tumors for MDX2001 expected to begin
catalysts.sentence: As of October 2025, the Phase 1 trial advanced to the fifth dose level, with Phase 1b studies in select solid tumors expected to begin in 2026.

catalysts.event: First-in-human Phase 1 trial for MDX2003 expected to initiate
catalysts.sentence: A first in human Phase 1 clinical trial with this antibody is expected to initiate in early 2026.

catalysts.event: IND application filing for oral LA-PTH tablet
catalysts.sentence: We aim to file an IND application for the LA-PTH tablet in late 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 study for OPK-88006 injectable
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete IND-enabling work and initiate a Phase 1 study in 2026.

catalysts.event: Doubling of EirGen annual output capacity to ~1 billion units
catalysts.sentence: This expansion is estimated to double EirGen's annual output capacity to approximately 1 billion units by 2027.

catalysts.event: First-in-human clinical trial for MDX2301 (BARDA contract) expected to initiate
catalysts.sentence: The first-in-human clinical trial is expected to initiate in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: global hGH market valued at $7.4 billion in 2024, expected to expand by up to 12.3% annually through 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Based on our internal estimates and industry data utilized in our strategy, the global hGH market was valued at approximately $7.4 billion in 2024 and is expected to expand by up to 12.3% annually through 2030.
